heading: Court supervision of expenditures; findings; report to Secretary
label: 666 Court supervision of expenditures; findings; report to Secretary
text: In addition to other duties prescribed by section 77 of the Bankruptcy Act, the court shall maintain supervision of the expenditure of funds obtained pursuant to for the purpose of assuring that such funds are used solely for purposes set forth in subsection (b) of such section, shall make periodic findings regarding such expenditures, and shall report those findings to the Secretary.section 662 of this title
notes: References in TextSection 77 of the Bankruptcy Act, referred to in text, was classified to section 205 of former Title 11, Bankruptcy. The Bankruptcy Act (, ) was repealed effective , by , §§ 401(a), 402(a), , , section 101 of which enacted revised Title 11. For current provisions relating to railroad reorganization, see subchapter IV (§ 1161 et seq.) of chapter 11 of Title 11.act July 1, 1898, ch. 54130 Stat. 544Pub.
